description_long: This house is a modern, multi-unit residential structure set on a landscaped plot with a mix of green lawn and paved surfaces. The building features a flat roof design and is composed of three distinct, vertically-aligned units, each with large, rectangular windows and private balconies or terraces. The front facade is characterized by clean lines, white exterior walls, and prominent window arrangements that maximize natural light. The property includes a driveway and a swimming pool, both integrated into the surrounding hardscape. The rear and side views reveal additional balconies and a stepped terrain, suggesting the house is built on a slightly sloped lot. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with a focus on geometric forms and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-unit house with flat roofs, large windows, balconies, a driveway, and a swimming pool, set on a landscaped, sloped plot. The design is minimalist and emphasizes geometric forms and outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing three main units with large windows, balconies, and a landscaped entry area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roofs, stepped terrain, and the driveway leading to the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, paved patio, and the back facades of the house units.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, driveway, and the arrangement of balconies along the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple, flush door with steps leading up, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
